name: Cooking Live Yorkshire Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl combine flour and salt. With a handheld mixer add the milk in a stream until smooth.
2. Add water and eggs and beat until combined well and bubbly. Let stand, covered, at room temperature for 1 hour.
3. Preheat oven to 450 degrees F (230 degrees C).
4. Divide drippings among eight muffin pan cups. Heat the cups in the oven until almost smoking.
5. Beat batter until bubbly, stir in rosemary and cayenne, and divide among muffin cups.
6. Bake for 10 minutes in the lower third of the oven without opening the oven door.
7. Reduce oven temperature to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) and continue to bake for another 10 minutes until puffed, crisp, and golden brown.
8. Serve immediately.
Yield: 8 servings
